description_long: This is a traditional wooden barrel, constructed from curved wooden staves bound together by several dark metal hoops. The barrel is mounted horizontally on a wooden stand, elevating it slightly above the ground. One end features a metal spigot for dispensing liquids, while the other end is plain and sealed. The wood shows natural grain patterns and some reddish staining, suggesting it may have been used for aging wine or spirits. The metal hoops provide structural reinforcement and contrast visually with the lighter wood. Subtle markings and a logo are visible on the front face, adding to its authenticity and suggesting it may be branded for a specific distillery or winery.
description: A classic wooden barrel with metal hoops, mounted on a wooden stand and featuring a front spigot and subtle branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel's circular face, spigot, and visible branding or markings.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the barrel, the curvature of the staves, and the supporting wooden stand.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, sealed end of the barrel with no spigot or markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the barrel's profile and stand, but with the spigot not visible.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: branding and measurement markings on front face
